en.title: Multimodal agents
en.description: I am interested in systems that combine language, visual grounding, planning, and tool use into practical agent pipelines.

en.title: Embodied intelligence
en.description: My long-term focus is how models reason about the physical world, interact with environments, and generalize across tasks.

en.title: UAV navigation
en.description: I am especially curious about vision-language navigation for drones and other constrained robotic platforms.

zh.title: 多模态智能体
zh.description: 关注把语言、视觉理解、规划与工具调用整合进统一 agent pipeline 的方法与系统实现。

zh.title: 具身智能
zh.description: 长期兴趣在于模型如何理解物理世界、与环境交互，并在任务之间实现可迁移的能力。

zh.title: 无人机导航
zh.description: 尤其关注面向无人机等受限平台的视觉语言导航，以及感知、决策与执行之间的耦合问题。
